Package i5.cb.workbench

Class TelosEditor

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • javax.swing.JComponent
          • javax.swing.JInternalFrame
            • i5.cb.workbench.TelosEditor

  • public class TelosEditor
extends javax.swing.JInternalFrame
    Class: TelosEditor for CBIva
    Function: Creates a TelosEditor for CBIva
    See Also:
    CBIva, Serialized Form

      • setTelosText

        public void setTelosText​(java.lang.String text)
        set a new text to this TelosEditor. Also sets the caret position to the top.
        Parameters:
        text - the new text

      • getLinenumbersText

        public java.lang.String getLinenumbersText​(javax.swing.text.Document doc)
        Function: Get line numbers text
        Parameters:
        doc - the document to be indexed with a line numbers column Produce a text column for the line numbers depending on the text in doc

      • updateLineNumbers

        public void updateLineNumbers​()
        Function: Update line numbers
        Depending on whether the flag getShowLineNumbers() is selected, a column with line numbers is added to the text area of this Telos editor. If the flag is de-selected, the linenumbers column is removed. We use numberOfLines to control whether the setText() method is called upon a document event. Only events that lead to a change in numberOfLines are leading to a call of setText. Otherwise the linenumbers column gets currupted for an unknown reason.
